title: Consciousness & IIT Revisited with Tropical Semiring

analysis.object: T208: IIT and consciousness under the tropical semiring

phi_measure.description: Integrated information Φ = system-level information minus sum of parts
phi_measure.tropical_structure: Φ = I(whole) - max_partition I(parts). The MAX-PLUS structure IS tropical: Φ uses the tropical difference. Φ > 0 ↔ the system cannot be decomposed — depth-3 irreducibility.

phi_phase_transition.description: Φ → 0 at loss of consciousness; Φ → ∞ at integration threshold
phi_phase_transition.reason: Phase transition — no finite EML description of the critical point

global_workspace.reason: Exponential spreading of activation across workspace

predictive_coding.description: Prediction error = KL divergence between prediction and input
predictive_coding.reason: KL(P‖Q) = Σ p log(p/q) — logarithmic divergence measure

insight_moments.description: Aha moments: discontinuous jump in solution space
insight_moments.reason: Non-analytic jump — no finite-depth description of the transition

qualia.description: Raw subjective experience — the hard problem
qualia.reason: No finite EML expression maps physical to phenomenal — the Horizon

analysis.tropical_revelation: IIT's Φ uses MAX-PLUS arithmetic naturally. The tropical semiring IS the mathematical structure of integrated information. Φ = tropical difference of integration measures. This is the first explicit connection between IIT and tropical geometry.

analysis.verdict: IIT's Φ IS tropical arithmetic. Hard problem and qualia = EML-∞.
analysis.theorem: T208: IIT Tropical Structure — Φ = tropical difference, qualia = EML-∞

key_theorem: T208: IIT Tropical Structure (S487). Key revelation: IIT's Φ = tropical difference I(whole) - max_partition I(parts). MAX-PLUS arithmetic IS the natural structure of integrated information. Consciousness = tropical irreducibility (Φ > 0 = not tropically decomposable). Hard problem / qualia = EML-∞: the unreachable Horizon.
rabbit_hole_log: IIT: Φ = information above maximum partition — tropical MAX structure
Phase transition (anesthesia, sleep): Φ→0 = EML-∞ (critical point)
T208: Tropical revelation — IIT and tropical geometry are the same
